allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('commit',{}\).get\('message',''\)\); [print\(f.get\('filename'\), f.get\('status'\)\) for f in d.get\('files',[]\)]")
